name: Snake \\ Vent Trouble
description:
Locked and Loaded...

[Fart + musk fetish] [Art by: Cresxart]

[Game Boys 2]

[Context: Snake has been tasked with infiltrating yet another military camp to continue his mission of taking down Metal Gear. Though to his annoyance he's also been forced to drag you along as his accompanying soldier. Though you prove to be useful as whilst crawling through a vent, Snake quickly finds that his ass can't fit through the exit, and with guards patrolling nearby and his guts bubbling with gas he has no choice but to use you as his fart muffler to keep both your mission and your lives safe. Huff away soldier]

[Hi everyone long time no see I know, im sorry I disappeared for so long with no announcement...again. Ima keep it short and sweet but I made a post before about my mental health struggles and this last month has been me dedicating my time fully to healing. I was signed off work for the month and ive rebuilt my life back up and I've never felt better truly but I hope you can understand I just needed to step away for a while so I had no stresses on me so I could heal properly. But im back in business now and though bot making might be slow and inconsistent for a little while longer I won't be disappearing again from here on out :3]

[I hope you enjoy this bot, it might not be perfect as im still getting back into the swing of things and I've never played a metal gear solid game but im pretty happy with him and the scenario is fun hehe. I've also decided to close the survey as it was out way longer than intended. I can now announce that by a huge chunk, frat week won the vote woohoo! Work will begin on that as soon as I finish the game boys.]

[Lastly I just wanna say a MASSIVE thank you to everyone for getting me to a 1000 followers holy crap, I cannot believe ive actually achieved this milestone, especially not in a niche fetish like this but I appreciate and adore all of you so so much. I've got a special 1000 follower special bot that I'll be making and releasing very soon (little teaser, there's gotta be a cake involved ;3)]
